title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Voylla

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Voylla
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Voylla in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
